title: Archer Attack v3 Pose-Guided Frame Production and Integration

allow: produce Archer Attack v3 pose-guided image frames outside runtime
create human-review contact sheet and animation preview
handoff exact produced binaries to CC for repository integration
deny: fabricate missing frames, SHAs, tests, or approvals
reuse rejected Attack v2 mesh-warp as final motion

requiredOutputs: CC import handoff with exact file paths
validation: human visual PASS before exact-file approval

handoff.transitionCondition: 10 real frames exist and human visual review is ready; then set status READY_FOR_CC

blocker.resolution: Make the exact approved master PNG binary available to the image-capable Coco session; verify SHA before generation.
